name: Shinato, King of a Higher Plane
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> シナト
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Shinato's Ark". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 8 or more. If this card destroys an opponent's Defense Position monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the destroyed monster's original ATK.

If this card destroys an opponent's Defense Position monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the destroyed monster's original ATK.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
